name: Column / upright post
definition: Rack uprights; shelving posts; platform columns

name: Beam / load member
definition: Pallet rack load beams; shelf beams; platform joists

name: Brace
definition: Diagonal/horizontal bracing members (orientation via CFG:SUP fields)

name: Base plate / footplate
definition: Column base/foot plates; style (extended/seismic) is a configuration field

name: Deck support member
definition: Support channels; hat stiffeners; deck reinforcements

name: Wire mesh panel
definition: Welded/woven mesh treated as a single homogeneous panel component

name: Panel
definition: Solid or perforated panel; perforation is CFG:PRF fields not a role split

name: Shelf
definition: Formed shelf components in shelving and workstations

name: Connector
definition: Beam end connectors; clip-in brackets; arm connectors

name: Clip / retainer
definition: Safety clips; deck retainers; shelf clips

name: Guard member
definition: Column protectors; rail members; mesh guard members
